tickets.title: Fix cart total calculation
tickets.description: Cart.getTotal() only sums prices without multiplying by quantity. A cart with 3x $10 items returns $10 instead of $30. Fix the reduce in src/cart.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: getTotal() returns price * quantity for each item
npm test exits with 0 failures for cart tests

tickets.title: Filter zero-quantity items from cart
tickets.description: Cart.getItems() returns items even when their quantity is 0 (e.g. after decrementing). It should only return items with quantity > 0.

tickets.title: Case-insensitive email lookup
tickets.description: findByEmail() in src/users.ts does a strict === comparison, so findByEmail("FOO@BAR.COM") won't match a user created with "foo@bar.com". Normalize to lowercase.

tickets.title: Validate user fields on create
tickets.description: createUser() in src/users.ts accepts empty strings for email and name. It should throw an error when either field is empty or whitespace-only.

tickets.title: Fix all sandbox bugs
tickets.description: Fix all 5 known bugs across src/cart.ts and src/users.ts. The cart module has getTotal() and getItems() bugs. The users module has findByEmail(), createUser(), and recordLogin() bugs. All 5 failing tests in the test suite should pass after this ticket.
